closedTesting.title: <c:gear-xp>Closed Testing</c>
closedTesting.text:
Hello testers!

Thank you for playing while the game is still in development. Please reach out if you encounter any problems!

Enjoy,
Optical Labs

welcome1.title: Caretaker (Tutorial)
welcome1.text:
Welcome to Space Explorer Inc.!

If you thought you were here for fun, you're absolutely wrong.

welcome2.title: Caretaker (Tutorial)
welcome2.text:
You are here to bring us profits. This is your life from now on:

Extract resources from planets and sell them in the Collector tab.

welcome3.title: Caretaker (Tutorial)
welcome3.text:
Use credits at local markets to buy better gear or unlock new planets.

You can also unlock skills as you gain experience, which allows you to work even more efficiently.

welcome4.title: Caretaker (Tutorial)
welcome4.text:
We look forward to your profitable contributions.

Do not disappoint us...
